/usr/bin/ar qc libnova-lib.a "CMakeFiles/nova-lib.dir/src/ast/Node.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nova-lib.dir/src/ast/Types.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nova-lib.dir/src/sema/ASTBuilder.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nova-lib.dir/src/sema/SymbolTable.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nova-lib.dir/src/sema/TypeChecker.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nova-lib.dir/src/codegen/CodeGenContext.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nova-lib.dir/src/codegen/CodegenVisitor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nova-lib.dir/src/utils/SourceLocation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nova-lib.dir/src/utils/Error.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nova-lib.dir/src/parser/NovaLexer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nova-lib.dir/src/parser/NovaParser.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nova-lib.dir/src/parser/NovaBaseListener.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nova-lib.dir/src/parser/NovaListener.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nova-lib.dir/src/parser/NovaBaseVisitor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nova-lib.dir/src/parser/NovaVisitor.cpp.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libnova-lib.a
